HR1023.reason: Repeals the Greenhouse Gas Reduction Fund (section 134 of Clean Air Act) which provides billions in financing for clean energy and renewable energy projects

HR9.reason: Climate Action Now Act - directs US to meet Paris Agreement commitments, which requires significant expansion of renewable energy production

HR4447.reason: Expanding Access to Sustainable Energy Act - promotes renewable energy development, energy efficiency, and clean energy deployment on public lands and buildings

HR702.reason: Lifts the ban on crude oil exports from the US - promotes fossil fuel production and export rather than renewable energy transition

HR161.reason: Natural Gas Pipeline Permitting Reform Act - streamlines approval of natural gas pipelines, promoting fossil fuel infrastructure over renewables

HR351.reason: LNG Permitting Certainty and Transparency Act - expedites approval of liquefied natural gas export facilities, promoting fossil fuel infrastructure

HR7176.reason: Unlocking our Domestic LNG Potential Act - reverses Biden administration pause on LNG export approvals, expanding fossil fuel exports rather than promoting renewables

HR6009.reason: Restoring American Energy Dominance Act - rolls back Biden-era clean energy policies and promotes fossil fuel production over renewable alternatives

HR1121.reason: Protecting American Energy Production Act - reverses Biden restrictions on oil and gas leasing on federal lands, promoting fossil fuels over renewable energy

HR3015.reason: National Coal Council Reestablishment Act - reestablishes federal advisory body promoting coal, a fossil fuel, rather than transitioning to renewables

HR6285.reason: Alaska's Right to Produce Act - opens Alaska's Arctic National Wildlife Refuge and other federal lands to oil and gas drilling, promoting fossil fuels over renewables

HR3062.reason: Promoting Cross-border Energy Infrastructure Act - facilitates cross-border fossil fuel pipelines and infrastructure, promoting fossil fuel transport

HR3668.reason: Improving Interagency Coordination for Pipeline Reviews Act - streamlines approval of fossil fuel pipelines, promoting fossil fuel infrastructure over renewable alternatives

HR1146.reason: Arctic Cultural and Coastal Plain Protection Act - prohibits oil and gas leasing in the Arctic Refuge coastal plain, protecting it from fossil fuel development

HR1941.reason: Coastal and Marine Economies Protection Act - bans new offshore oil and gas leasing in the Atlantic and Pacific coasts, opposing fossil fuel expansion

HJRES131.reason: CRA disapproval of BLM Coastal Plain Oil and Gas Leasing Program Record of Decision - the Biden-era decision restricted oil leasing in the Arctic Refuge; voting Yea reopens it for fossil fuel production

SJRES91.reason: Senate CRA disapproval of BLM Coastal Plain Oil and Gas Leasing Program - same as HJRES131, voting Yea reopens Arctic Refuge for oil and gas leasing

SJRES80.reason: CRA disapproval of BLM rule on National Petroleum Reserve in Alaska management plan - the Biden-era plan restricted oil leasing; voting Yea opens more federal land for fossil fuel production

HJRES75.reason: CRA disapproval of DOE energy conservation standards for commercial refrigerators/freezers - voting Yea blocks energy efficiency standards that reduce fossil fuel demand

HJRES24.reason: CRA disapproval of DOE energy conservation standards for walk-in coolers and freezers - voting Yea blocks energy efficiency standards

HJRES20.reason: CRA disapproval of DOE energy conservation standards for consumer gas-fired instantaneous water heaters - voting Yea blocks energy efficiency standards that would reduce fossil fuel consumption

HJRES42.reason: CRA disapproval of DOE energy conservation standards for appliances - voting Yea blocks energy efficiency regulations

SJRES58.reason: CRA disapproval of DOE energy conservation standards for consumer furnaces - voting Yea blocks efficiency standards that would reduce fossil fuel consumption for home heating

HR9468.reason: Rescinds funds from DOE loan programs office - these programs provide loans for clean energy and renewable energy projects; defunding them opposes renewable energy development

HR1640.reason: Save Our Gas Stoves Act - blocks potential DOE energy efficiency regulations on gas stoves, protecting fossil fuel appliances

HR6192.reason: Hands Off Our Home Appliances Act - blocks DOE energy efficiency regulations on home appliances that would reduce fossil fuel consumption

SJRES38.reason: CRA disapproval of Buy America waiver for EV chargers - voting Yea blocks the waiver that facilitated faster deployment of electric vehicle charging infrastructure

HR3797.reason: Satisfying Energy Needs and Saving the Environment Act (SENSE Act) - promotes natural gas as alternative to coal but opposes renewable mandates, framing fossil gas as the solution
